narrative.description: Minecraft is a sandbox survival game where players gather resources, craft tools, build structures, and explore procedurally generated worlds in creative or survival modes.
narrative.core_loop: Mine blocks and gather materials by day, craft tools and shelter, survive hostile mobs at night, and expand bases or explore deeper dimensions at your own pace.

mechanics.map_notes: In Minecraft, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.
mechanics.expression: In Minecraft, minimal UI encourages discovery of landmarks and secrets across vast terrain.

mechanics.map_notes: In Minecraft, a progression gate where a fixed collection target must be met before an upgrade or skill point becomes available, tying advancement directly to measurable progress.
mechanics.expression: In Minecraft, a progression gate where a fixed collection target must be met before an upgrade or skill point becomes available, tying advancement directly to measurable progress.

mechanics.map_notes: In Minecraft, players collect currency through gameplay and exchange it at vendors for permanent upgrades, creating economic progression choices.
mechanics.expression: In Minecraft, players collect currency through gameplay and exchange it at vendors for permanent upgrades, creating economic progression choices.

mechanics.map_notes: In Minecraft, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Minecraft, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

mechanics.map_notes: In Minecraft, hidden rooms, passages, or content zones exist off main paths, requiring players to investigate suspicious environments.
mechanics.expression: In Minecraft, hidden rooms, passages, or content zones exist off main paths, requiring players to investigate suspicious environments.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Minecraft through its core sandbox loop.
